title: NerdPack
description: This modpack improves the Minecraft experience through game-changing mods, optimizations, and more! Hundreds of mods and counting!
body: ## ANNOUNCEMENT: I’m currently working on another collaborative modpack on CurseForge, MysticTech! Currently most of my work is focused on that, so if you want to check it out, it’s [here](https://curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/mystictech). ### **NerdPack is designed to reimagine and rekindle the flame for Minecraft by adding new features, world generation, optimizations, and more!** **NOTICE:** I have had to remove lots of CurseForge overrides from NerdPack. If you would like to still access these mods (for the entire pack experience), use [this wiki](https://github.com/UnperishedDev/NerdPack/wiki) to learn how to download these mods (specifically section 1.4). If you simply want the link to the extra mods, you can find that [here](https://moddermore.net/list/pdyvoNJ1vrEq). **What is NerdPack, I hear you ask?** NerdPack is a 1.19.2 fabric modpack. It is an immersive pack for Minecraft Java edition including over 260 mods (>80 libraries!). It encompasses a wide range of changes, such as new dimensions, biomes, items, technology, gameplay optimization, shaders, and more! If you truly think this modpack deserves it, share it with other people, no pressure! You can report issues to NerdPack on GitHub. I will do my best to check/review any problems that arise. Feel free to let me know if you see any issues with the modpack. ## Featured Mods: - BetterX (BetterNether, BetterEnd) - Oh the Biomes You’ll Go - Deeper and Darker - Farmer’s Delight (plus lots of addons!) - Blockus - Decorative Blocks - Ecologics - Terralith World Generation - Ad Astra - Sodium, Lithium, Starlight, Iris - Minecraft Dungeons Additions (MC Dungeons Armors, Artifacts, & Weapons) - YUNG’s mods - Tech Reborn & Applied Energistics 2 - Eden Ring - Hundreds more! (Check versions for all mod dependencies.) As NerdPack is currently in early development, more updates will come out over time. This version is stable. I recommend *6-8 GB* of RAM for best performance.
